india_trends.title: India expects annual fertiliser subsidy bill to rise by 20%
india_trends.summary: India's fertilizer subsidy bill is set to rise by 20% this financial year. This increase is driven by higher prices caused by the Middle East crisis. India is importing record amounts of urea at significantly increased costs. These rising import expenses will likely boost subsidies to companies sell

india_trends.title: Global Market Update: Pakistan's central bank hikes key rate by 100 bps to 11.5%
india_trends.summary: Pakistan's central bank ​raised its key policy ​rate by 100 basis points ​to 11.5% on Monday, its first hike in almost three years, as rising oil prices ‌from the Iran-U.S. ⁠war ⁠threatened to push inflation higher in the import-dependent ​nation.

india_trends.title: IDFC First Bank deposit growth returning to 20%, credit costs falling, no West Asia impact yet: V Vaidyanathan
india_trends.summary: IDFC First Bank's CEO V Vaidyanathan stated that the deliberate slowdown in deposit growth during Q4 was temporary and already reversing, with April data showing strong momentum. He expressed confidence in achieving 20% annual deposit growth in FY27, alongside lower credit costs and controlled opera

india_trends.title: Cathie Wood sells $74-million shares of this semiconductor company after stock skyrockets 72% in one month
india_trends.summary: Cathie Wood sold over $74 million in Advanced Micro Devices shares after a sharp rally, while buying Amazon stock. Despite outflows from ARK ETFs, she remains bullish on innovation and dismissed concerns about an AI-driven market bubble forming soon.

india_trends.title: MobiKwik shares jump 12% after RBI nod for NBFC licence to launch lending arm
india_trends.summary: Shares of One MobiKwik Systems surged 12% on Monday after receiving the Reserve Bank of India's approval for an NBFC licence, enabling it to launch direct lending operations. The move marks a key step in its transition to a full-stack fintech platform, boosting growth and margin potential.

india_trends.title: Amba Auto Sales & Services IPO Day 1: Issue booked 11% so far; check GMP, price band & other details
india_trends.summary: Amba Auto Sales &amp; Services IPO Day 1: The price band for Amba Auto Sales &amp; Services IPO has been set at ₹130 to ₹135 per share. Retail investors need to apply for at least two lots of 1,000 shares each, resulting in a minimum payout of ₹135,000 at the upper end of the price band.

india_trends.title: Axis Bank vs IndusInd vs IDFC First: Which bank stock should investors pick post Q4 results 2026?
india_trends.summary: Post Q4FY26, Axis Bank emerges as the top pick for conservative investors due to its strong performance and asset quality, while IndusInd Bank is seen as a high-risk turnaround option. IDFC First Bank shows stable metrics but faces earnings visibility challenges.

india_trends.summary: Maruti Suzuki India Limited is expected to post strong Q4FY26 revenue growth of up to 30% YoY, driven by higher volumes and improved realisations. india_trends.title: Structural shift in Indian gold buy underway, 40% purchases in FY27 to be as investments: Report
india_trends.summary: Indians are shifting their gold purchases towards investment. This trend is expected to continue, with investment demand potentially reaching 35-40% of total gold consumption in the current fiscal year. Gold ETFs and bar-and-coin buying are driving this surge. india_trends.title: Mahindra Holidays & Resorts India Q4 profit down 43 pc at Rs 41.49 cr
india_trends.summary: Mahindra Holidays & Resorts India Ltd on Monday reported a 43 per cent decline in consolidated profit after tax to Rs 41.49 crore in the fourth quarter ended on March 31, 2026, impacted by outgo on impairment charges, new labour code and forex movement.

india_trends.title: Top Gainers & Losers on April 27: Sun Pharma, Varun Beverages, Suzlon Energy, Anant Raj among top gainers
india_trends.summary: On April 27, domestic equities rose nearly 1%, ending a three-day losing streak, driven by technology stocks and gains in pharma and consumer goods. The Nifty 50 and Sensex advanced 0.80%, with all sectoral indices closing higher.

india_trends.title: Fed likely to hold rates steady as Powell prepares for possible swan song
india_trends.summary: Federal Reserve policymakers will gather in Washington ​this week in what may be Jerome Powell's last meeting as head of the U.S. ​central bank, with energy prices still elevated and the Iran war at a standstill and likely to prolong uncertainty about the economic and monetary policy outlook.

india_trends.title: India’s banking system turns sluggish amid loan recovery delays and legal hurdles: CII report
india_trends.summary: India's banking sector needs urgent reforms. The Confederation of Indian Industry's report highlights slow loan recovery and complex laws. Reforms aim to speed up legal processes and improve efficiency. Stricter timelines and stronger institutions are recommended. Simplifying laws under a unified co

india_trends.title: Rupee ends nearly flat, likely RBI presence blunts hit from higher oil prices
india_trends.summary: The Indian rupee ended modestly stronger on ​Monday, as dollar sales by ​state-run banks cushioned the pressure from higher oil ​prices on the currency after the U.S.-Iran talks stalled.
